overview: Gemini 3 Flash is a large language model from Google, part of the Gemini Flash line. Released 2025-12-17. Fast, cost-efficient mid-tier Gemini model balancing speed and intelligence.
What's notable in this version: Pro-grade reasoning at Flash latency/cost; ~3x faster than 2.5 Pro, 78% on SWE-bench Verified.
